parameters.query:
update design_documents
set
  design_concept_summary = $1,
  design_concept_json = $2::jsonb,
  design_prompt_context = $3,
  analyzed_at = now(),
  analysis_model = $4,
  updated_at = now()
where id = $5::uuid;

insert into analysis_runs (document_id, model, status, input_tokens, output_tokens, error_message, completed_at)
values ($5::uuid, $4, 'completed', null, null, null, now());
